channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Benue community mourns youth leader killed in gun attack
item.description: A youth leader, Sunday Ogoh, was murdered in a gun attack on the Ondo community in Ugboju district of Otukpo Local Government Area, Benue State. The attack, which happened early Tuesday, saw gunmen in...

item.title: Ebanel Urea Cream: A High-Concentration Solution for Treating Rough and Cracked Skin
item.description: The article highlights Ebanel Urea Cream, a highly concentrated urea-based product with 40% urea content, which is praised for its effectiveness in softening dead skin, reducing callus buildup, and re...

item.title: UK Condemns Iran's Involvement in European Attacks via Proxy Groups
item.description: The British Foreign Ministry has summoned Iran's top diplomat in London, Ali Nasimfar, accusing Tehran of directing proxy groups to carry out attacks across Europe between March and May. The Islamic R...

item.title: NSW School Admin Charged with Child Abuse Material Offences
item.description: A 35-year-old administrative staff member at Gilgandra Public School in New South Wales has been arrested and charged with distributing child abuse material following a police raid. Lucy McKenzie was ...

item.title: CFIB Report Highlights Provincial Trade Barriers and Calls for Improved Results
item.description: The Canadian Federation of Independent Business (CFIB) released an annual report grading provinces and the federal government on their handling of internal trade barriers. While some provinces receive...

item.title: Bilawal proposes high-powered Truth and Reconciliation Commission to address unrest in AJK
item.description: PPP Chairman Bilawal Bhutto-Zardari has called for the establishment of a high-powered commission with full authority to investigate the recent unrest in Azad Jammu and Kashmir (AJK) in accordance wit...

item.title: ICC Adjusts ODI and T20I World Cup Formats, Potentially Adding Pakistan-India Match
item.description: The International Cricket Council (ICC) has announced changes to the formats of the 2027 men's ODI World Cup and the 2028 T20I World Cup. The ODI World Cup will now feature a preliminary round for the...

item.title: Woman Goes Viral on TikTok After Her Remarkable Resemblance to Erling Haaland
item.description: A social media user identified as nas_kos has attracted widespread attention online after videos highlighting her striking resemblance to Norwegian football star Erling Haaland went viral. The clips, ...

item.title: Kenyan Woman's Journey from McDonald's to CFO and Business Ownership
item.description: Sanya, a Kenyan woman, moved to the US at 19 and started her career cleaning tables at McDonald's, rising to Assistant General Manager within two years. She later left her stable job to pursue educati...

item.title: Marcos and Singapore PM Lawrence Wong reaffirm bilateral ties, expand cooperation on trade, AI, health, and investments
item.description: President Ferdinand “Bongbong” Marcos Jr. met with Singapore Prime Minister Lawrence Wong during his working visit to Singapore to further strengthen the longstanding bilateral relationship between th...

item.title: Tanzania Prisons Football Club Struggles to Avoid Relegation in Premier League
item.description: Tanzania Prisons football club, representing the correctional services institution, faces a critical battle to stay in the Tanzania Mainland Premier League. With just one match remaining, the Mbeya-ba...

item.title: Martin Lewis advises booking summer flights during school holidays for cheaper prices
item.description: The article discusses financial expert Martin Lewis's advice on securing cheaper summer flights by strategically timing bookings around school holiday periods. Lewis recommends that travelers in Scotl...

item.title: The Impact of Trump's Policies on National Stability and Democracy
item.description: This article examines the cumulative effects of Donald Trump's policies and actions over his tenure, highlighting how they have eroded democratic institutions, exacerbated economic inequality, and des...

item.title: Congress Criticizes BJP Over Revoked Permission For Rahul Gandhi's Dehradun Event
item.description: The Congress party accused the BJP government of Uttarakhand of being fearful of Rahul Gandhi's growing influence after revoking permission for his 'Chhatro Ki Goonj' event in Dehradun. The administra...

item.title: DA Questions Minister McKenzie's R31 Million World Cup Spending
item.description: The Democratic Alliance (DA) has repeatedly demanded transparency from Minister of Sport, Arts and Culture Mckenzie regarding the R31 million spent on his delegation to the FIFA World Cup 2026. Despit...

item.title: Tanzanians Advised to Plan for Retirement Early Amid Economic Pressures
item.description: Financial experts and government officials in Tanzania are emphasizing the need for early retirement planning to ensure long-term financial security. With rising living costs, demographic shifts, and ...

item.title: US Reimposes Blockade on Iran, Sparks Threats to Halt Mideast Energy Exports
item.description: The US has reimposed a naval blockade on Iran, escalating tensions in the Middle East as both nations intensify airstrikes. The blockade, part of a broader conflict over control of the Strait of Hormu...

item.title: Microplastics in Confectionery: Industry Response and Regulatory Challenges
item.description: Microplastics are becoming a significant concern for confectionery manufacturers due to their potential presence in ingredients, equipment, and packaging. The article highlights that contamination can...

item.title: Fern Britton's Journey Through TV and Beyond
item.description: Fern Britton, the beloved TV presenter, reflects on her career spanning decades, including her 10-year tenure on This Morning. She discusses overcoming sexual harassment, tabloid intrusion, and a tumu...

item.title: Republican Confirmation Hearing for Todd Blanche Faces Last-Minute Strategy Shift and Controversies
item.description: The confirmation hearing for Todd Blanche, acting Attorney General, faced significant challenges after the sudden death of Senator Lindsey Graham, a key Republican advocate, just days before the heari...
